# MuleSoft Amazon Redshift Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Amazon Redshift Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon Redshift Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-redshift-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon Redshift Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon Redshift Connector 1.2 Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-redshift-connector/latest/amazon-redshift-connector-example.md)
- [Amazon Redshift Connector 1.2 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-redshift-connector/latest/amazon-redshift-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Amazon Redshift Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-redshift-connector/latest/amazon-redshift-connector-studio.md)
- [Amazon Redshift Connector 1.2 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-redshift-connector/latest/amazon-redshift-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon Redshift Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-redshift-connector/latest/index.md)
